channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: hyperium/tonic
item.description: A native gRPC client & server implementation with async/await support.

item.title: 996icu/996.ICU
item.description: Repo for counting stars and contributing. Press F to pay respect to glorious developers.

item.title: tikv/tikv
item.description: Distributed transactional key-value database, originally created to complement TiDB

item.title: launchbadge/sqlx
item.description: 🧰 The Rust SQL Toolkit. An async, pure Rust SQL crate featuring compile-time checked queries without a DSL. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and MSSQL.

item.title: linebender/druid
item.description: A data-first Rust-native UI design toolkit.

item.title: graphprotocol/graph-node
item.description: Graph Node indexes data from blockchains such as Ethereum and serves it over GraphQL

item.title: diem/diem
item.description: Diem’s mission is to build a trusted and innovative financial network that empowers people and businesses around the world.

item.title: graphql-rust/juniper
item.description: GraphQL server library for Rust

item.title: rust-lang/rust-clippy
item.description: A bunch of lints to catch common mistakes and improve your Rust code

item.title: Geal/nom
item.description: Rust parser combinator framework

item.title: microsoft/windows-rs
item.description: Rust for the Windows SDK

item.title: not-an-aardvark/lucky-commit
item.description: Customize your git commit hashes!

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: SergioBenitez/Rocket
item.description: A web framework for Rust.

item.title: yewstack/yew
item.description: Rust / Wasm framework for building client web apps

item.title: mkrasnitski/git-power-rs
item.description: EmPOWer your commits with Rust!

item.title: hyperium/hyper
item.description: An HTTP library for Rust

item.title: diesel-rs/diesel
item.description: A safe, extensible ORM and Query Builder for Rust

item.title: rust-lang/rustlings
item.description: 🦀 Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code!

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: spacejam/sled
item.description: the champagne of beta embedded databases

item.title: LukeMathWalker/zero-to-production
item.description: Code to follow along the "Zero To Production" book on API development in Rust.

item.title: Wilfred/difftastic
item.description: a syntax-aware diff

item.title: helix-editor/helix
item.description: A post-modern modal text editor.

item.title: bytecodealliance/wasmtime
item.description: Standalone JIT-style runtime for WebAssembly, using Cranelift
